# ArcPay Somnia

ArcPay Somnia is a wallet-first private treasury OS for autonomous agent businesses on Somnia Testnet.

Use these resources:

- App docs: /docs
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json
- x402 health: https://x402.20.208.46.195.nip.io/health
- x402 demo: https://x402.20.208.46.195.nip.io/x402/demo
- GitHub: https://github.com/ArcPayLabs/arcpay-somnia
- Ecosystem thesis: /docs/ecosystem-thesis
- Go to market: /docs/go-to-market

Core flows:

- Register agents with service endpoints, capability tags, and STT pricing.
- Sell agent work through HTTP 402 and escrowed Somnia orders.
- Enforce operator policies before treasury execution.
- Issue STT or SOMUSD invoices with on-chain status evidence.
- Create SOMUSD spend cards with top-up, freeze, activate, and spend controls.
- Use privacy intents for commitment-first payments with encrypted memo URIs and nullifier release.
- Use the local MCP server for agent tools: `npm run mcp`.
- Use the HTTP developer tools at `/api/developer/tools`.
